ALSO APPEARING PLANTIFF'S WITNESS KARIANA JENKINS. DEFENDANT JOCELYN MEDRANO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
